results.title: TexAgs Rewind (5/28)
results.description: Thursday's edition of the Rewind heard the GO Hour with TexAgs columnist Olin Buchanan, Texas A&M head baseball coach Michael Earley, FOX Sports Radio host Aaron Torres and The Fan Show.

results.title: 'Change your team': Ambati Rayudu explains why Yashasvi Jaiswal must quit RR due to Vaibhav Sooryavanshi
results.description: Ambati Rayudu believes Yashasvi Jaiswal may need to consider leaving Rajasthan Royals after Vaibhav Sooryavanshi's stunning rise in IPL 2026. The former CSK batter suggested increased competition for opening spots could impact Jaiswal's long-term role at RR.
